command.report.failed.webhook: An issue may have occurred during your report. Don't hesitate to contact the staff if no operator is online.
command.report.success: Report successfully submitted. Thank you for your vigilance.
disconnect.banned.title: You are banned on this server
freeze.begins: You have been frozen by an operator. Please wait for instructions and don't log out.
freeze.ends: You are no longer frozen. You can continue playing normally.
misc.time_remaining: Time remaining: %days% days, %hours% hours, and %minutes% minutes
mute.begins: You were muted by an operator.
mute.begins.reason: You were muted by an operator. Reason: %reason%
mute.message_cancelled: You can't send messages while muted!
spawn.enter: You are now in the spawn protection
spawn.leave: You are no longer in the spawn protection
warn.message: You've been warned by %operator%: %reason%. Please check the rules!
warn.title: YOU'VE BEEN WARNED!
